top_constraint: Outcome capture exists, but CYVX needs repeated outcome volume to calibrate trust.
next_best_action: Build Prediction Ledger + Simulation Ranking as the next durable intelligence layer.

prediction.prediction: If CYVX builds a recurring prediction ledger and simulation ranking layer next, mission quality and trust calibration will improve faster than adding more UI panels.
prediction.expected_outcome: CYVX produces ranked predictions, simulated mission choices, and measurable expected-vs-actual records for each mission.
prediction.success_metric: At least one prediction, one ranked opportunity, one economic score, one self-improvement mission, and one proof report generated per flywheel run.

mission.title: Prediction Ledger + Simulation Ranking
mission.objective: Turn CYVX intelligence into a recurring flywheel: reality acquisition, prediction, economic ranking, mission generation, outcome capture, trust calibration, learning, and self-improvement.
mission.top_constraint: Outcome capture exists, but CYVX needs repeated outcome volume to calibrate trust.
mission.expected_outcome: CYVX produces ranked predictions, simulated mission choices, and measurable expected-vs-actual records for each mission.
mission.next_best_action: Build Prediction Ledger + Simulation Ranking as the next durable intelligence layer.
